name: @agentlibdev/agentlib
description: Cloudflare-first public registry for portable AI agents

scripts.d1:reset:local: rm -rf .wrangler/state && npm run d1:migrate:local && npm run d1:seed:providers:local && npm run d1:seed:sample:local
scripts.d1:list:local: wrangler d1 execute DB --local --persist-to .wrangler/state --command "SELECT namespace, name, latest_version FROM agents ORDER BY namespace, name;" --json
